response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership in fintech or regulated environments. His technical depth in agentic AI and fintech integration is unproven at scale, though his open-source contributions and tooling work show potential.
strengths: Diverse technical background spanning full-stack, distributed systems, and real-time data processing (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, event-driven GISCollective).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq) and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
Proven ability to design scalable systems and mentor teams (e.g., CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, workshops).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, CTO-level decision-making).
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, real-time financial risk modeling).
Agentic AI experience appears experimental (e.g., tooling/prototypes) rather than production-grade for high-stakes environments.
